Entoplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Entoplastron fragment.
Entoplastron.Contour: The fragment has a rhomboid or diamond-shaped outline formed by jagged suture lines.
Entoplastron.Pattern: The surface features a cross-shaped (+) intersection of grooves.

Right Epiplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Right Epiplastron fragment.
Right Epiplastron.Contour: The top edge is a smooth original curve, while the inner edges are jagged sutures.
Right Epiplastron.Pattern: It features a curved groove line sweeping downwards to the left.

Left Epiplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Left Epiplastron fragment.
Left Epiplastron.Contour: The top edge is a smooth original curve, while the inner edges are jagged sutures.
Left Epiplastron.Pattern: It features a curved groove line sweeping downwards to the right.

Right Hyoplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Right Hyoplastron fragment.
Right Hyoplastron.Contour: The top inner corner has a notch to fit the central diamond bone. The bottom edge is a straight horizontal suture line.
Right Hyoplastron.Pattern: Characterized by horizontal texture, often showing two parallel groove lines.

Left Hyoplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Left Hyoplastron fragment.
Left Hyoplastron.Contour: The top inner corner has a notch to fit the central diamond bone. The bottom edge is a straight horizontal suture line.
Left Hyoplastron.Pattern: Characterized by horizontal texture, often showing two parallel groove lines.

Right Hypoplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Right Hypoplastron fragment.
Right Hypoplastron.Contour: The top edge is a straight horizontal suture line. The bottom edge is irregular or curved where it meets the tail bone.
Right Hypoplastron.Pattern: Features a single horizontal groove line that forms a slightly backward-convex arc.

Left Hypoplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Left Hypoplastron fragment.
Left Hypoplastron.Contour: The top edge is a straight horizontal suture line. The bottom edge is irregular or curved where it meets the tail bone.
Left Hypoplastron.Pattern: Features a single horizontal groove line that forms a slightly backward-convex arc.

Right Xiphiplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Right Xiphiplastron fragment.
Right Xiphiplastron.Contour: The top edge is jagged, and the bottom tip is usually concave or pointed.
Right Xiphiplastron.Pattern: Features a groove line sloping steeply downwards to the right.

Left Xiphiplastron.prefix: A close-up of the Left Xiphiplastron fragment.
Left Xiphiplastron.Contour: The top edge is jagged, and the bottom tip is usually concave or pointed.
Left Xiphiplastron.Pattern: Features a groove line sloping steeply downwards to the left.
